response.text:
COUNTER

rationale: Accept 0.5 kWh but condition on r0c1 demonstrating load reduction to <0.8 kW—cluster deficit is cascading and your 27% SoC cannot sustain peer support without breaching our 20% floor; prioritize external inbound solicitation and prepare load-shed triggers at 15%.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c1. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'normal'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.24 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Islanded cluster in cascading deficit. r0c2 SoC 26.5% and declining at ~2.6%/15min. Load unsustainable without external supply or inbound energy. r0c1 (27% SoC) and r1c2 (10% SoC) both in distress. Maintain 20% SoC floor for islanded resilience; offer only 0.03 kW/tick to prevent neighbor collapse while aggressively soliciting inbound energy. Prepare load-shedding if SoC < 15%..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
